itinerary.title: Hanoi – Ninh Binh countryside
itinerary.description: Delve deeper into Vietnam's past with a day visit to the picturesque province of Ninh Binh. Explore ancient sites as well as a relaxing sampan cruise through 'Halong Bay on Land'. Begin your journey with a delectable breakfast hotel breakfast to give you all of the energy you will need for the day of exciting sightseeing. Once finished we'll depart from Hanoi and travel towards Hoa Lu - Tam Coc. Along the way, you will have the opportunity to witness captivating rural scenery along the way. The

Once finished we'll depart from Hanoi and travel towards Hoa Lu - Tam Coc
Along the way, you will have the opportunity to witness captivating rural scenery along the way

itinerary.title: Hanoi city tour- Night train to Lao Cai station
itinerary.description: Hanoi is an irresistible destination for its picturesque pagodas, ancient temples, enchanting French colonial quarter, and cultural institutions. Just as fun, however, is darting down its winding lanes and discovering your own favorite hidden corners. Hanoi’s winding streets are full of surprises from quiet cafés to vibrant local markets filled with more fresh fruit than one could imagine. Exploring these hidden gems provides visitors with a deeper and more meaningful connection to the city of H
activities: Hanoi is an irresistible destination for its picturesque pagodas, ancient temples, enchanting French colonial quarter, and cultural institutions
Just as fun, however, is darting down its winding lanes and discovering your own favorite hidden corners

itinerary.title: Lao Cai - Sapa - Visit Cat Cat village
itinerary.description: The train arrives at around 6:00 am. Look for the “AsiaTourAdvisor’s Logo & Your Name” sign when you exit the train station, as our driver will pick you up there and transfer to the former hill station of Sapa.After having breakfast at a local restaurant, have having a short transfer to visit Cat Cat village which is the home to Black Hmong. Coming into some local houses to study how the local people make their clothes and other handicraft from Hemp and Indigo as well as their culture, custom an
activities: The train arrives at around 6:00 am

itinerary.title: Sapa - Muong Hoa valley - Express bus to Hanoi
itinerary.description: After breakfast and check out hotel,we have a short transfer to visit Y Linh Ho village which is inhabited by black Hmong tribe and completely secluded from tourists, especially you are able to embrace raw Sapa culture and community by coming into some native houses to discover their own culture and custom as well as study how the local tribe make handicraft from natural materials such as: hemp, indigo…ect. Continuing to walk down Muong Hoa River where you can take a rest or swim before trekking
activities: Continuing to walk down Muong Hoa River where you can take a rest or swim before trekking

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Halong Bay
itinerary.description: Our journey embarks from Hanoi where we'll pick you up for a scenic drive through the verdant landscapes of the Red River Delta. Our destination: the world-famous UNESCO World Heritage site, Halong Bay, Lan Ha Bay. Here, you'll embark on a luxurious cruise for an enchanting overnight cruise.As you relax on board, you'll be captivated by the breathtaking limestone karsts that majestically emerge from the azure waters, surrounded by thousands of jungle-clad islands seemingly suspended on the gentl
activities: Our journey embarks from Hanoi where we'll pick you up for a scenic drive through the verdant landscapes of the Red River Delta
Our destination: the world-famous UNESCO World Heritage site, Halong Bay, Lan Ha Bay

itinerary.title: Halong - Hanoi – Flight to Hue
itinerary.description: Kickstart your day with Tai Chi on the top deck or savor the sunrise over the bay. Sip on morning coffee or tea before setting out to explore nearby islands via rowboat.Upon returning to the junk, witness a fruit carving demonstration and participate in a cooking class, learning to create traditional Vietnamese cuisine from scratch. Enjoy a Vietnamese lunch on board as you cruise back to Halong City. Upon arrival, your driver will be waiting at the dock to take you to Noi Bai Airport for your sh

itinerary.title: Hue Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Hue is one of the most charming towns in Central Vietnam boasting a long and illustrious history as one of the main royal capitals of the country.On today’s exhibition, you will explore the royal city of Hue once served as an imperial capital to the Nguyen Lords, a feudal dynasty that reigned from the 17th to the 19th century. This historical city is overflowing with cultural treasures that reflect its royal past. As you travel throughout the city you will have the chance to explore splendid emp
activities: Hue is one of the most charming towns in Central Vietnam boasting a long and illustrious history as one of the main royal capitals of the country
This historical city is overflowing with cultural treasures that reflect its royal past
As you travel throughout the city you will have the chance to explore splendid emp

itinerary.title: Travel from Hue to Hoi An
itinerary.description: After breakfast and check out of your hotel, meet your private guide and driver for a three-hour drive to Hoi An via the stunningly Hai Van Pass. Also known as the “Cloudy Pass,” this winding mountain road overlooks the lush countryside, sandy beaches, the blue waters of the South China Sea, and the coastal city of Da Nang.En route, you will pause in Danang to visit the Marble Mountain with its beautiful caves of worship and the Museum of Cham Sculpture’s collection of artifacts dating back to t
activities: After breakfast and check out of your hotel, meet your private guide and driver for a three-hour drive to Hoi An via the stunningly Hai Van Pass

itinerary.title: Hoi An Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Begin your day with a morning market tour, sourcing a variety of fresh ingredients for your upcoming cooking class later in the afternoon. Accompanied by your guide and driver, you'll embark on a journey to the bustling Hoi An local market, where a myriad of sights, sounds, and aromas await. Take a leisurely stroll through the market's vibrant aisles, engaging with local vendors and selecting the finest produce for your culinary adventure that awaits. Though some may find the markets overwhelmin

itinerary.title: Hoi An free and relax
itinerary.description: The most common regret from travelers leaving Vietnam is staying too short in Hoi An! You can stay from three to five nights or even longer, it’s really hard to run out of things to see & do in Hoi An. From the lanterns to the beach, from the boat trips to the shopping, from the vegetable villages to the handcraft areas.After breakfast at the hotel, enjoy time on your own activities or ask our travel experts to organize our Hoi An tour collections.Meals, Activities & StayHoi An Lunch at local fa

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh Sightseeing - Cu Chi tunnels
itinerary.description: After enjoying your breakfast, your private guide will meet accompany you on a drive to Cu Chi, a quaint community located 60km northwest of Ho Chi Minh City. Cu Chi is renowned for its extensive network of tunnels, which served as a strategic hideout and infiltration route for the Viet Cong during the latter stages of the Vietnam War.Upon arrival, you'll have the opportunity to watch a brief introductory video from the era before delving into the tunnels themselves, widely recognized as one of

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh – Mekong Delta – Can Tho
itinerary.description: After breakfast, your private guide and driver will escort you out of Ho Chi Minh City and onto beautiful country roads to Ben Tre Town in the Mekong Delta. This region of the Mekong Delta is famous for its vast rice fields, numerous waterways, and stunning landscapes. Known as the ‘rice bowl’ of Vietnam, the Mekong Delta produces the majority of the country’s fruit, rice, sugar cane, and coconuts. On your journey, you will have the opportunity to take in the endless acres of green fields and th
activities: This region of the Mekong Delta is famous for its vast rice fields, numerous waterways, and stunning landscapes

itinerary.title: Floating market – Rach Gia speedboat port- Phu Quoc island
itinerary.description: Rise early the next morning for a boat trip to Cai Rang market, the biggest floating wholesale market of the Mekong region. The market comes alive with hundreds of small boats darting through the water as vendors sell their goods. Glide through the matrix of boats to see how the locals trade fruits, vegetables other products and learn more about the floating marketing culture and the daily life of those who call the boats home.After immersing yourself in the lively atmosphere, enjoy a delicious
